briefdescription.para: This table contains the timeout period of LTS3 for different FFE Levels in Milliseconds.
This table contains the attributes for SCDC fields Each entry consists of: 1) Register Offset 2) Bits Mask 3) Bits Shift.
This function reads the specified FRL SCDC Field.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.
specifies the fields from SCDC channels to be written

briefdescription.para: This function writes the specified FRL SCDC Field.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.
specifies the fields from SCDC channels to be written
specifies the values to be written

briefdescription.para: This function initializes FRL-specific SCDC fields that are required for FRL operation.

detaileddescription.para: This should be called separately from the basic SCDC clear operation when FRL is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx1 core instance.

simplesect.para: This function should only be called when FRL is enabled.

briefdescription.para: This is the main file for Xilinx HDMI RX core for FRL.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_hdmirx1_frl.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 EB 25/06/18 Initial release.
